---
title: "About Me"
description: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{=html}
<div class="about-me-profile">

<a href="https://github.com/liketocood345" class="about-me-avatar-link">
  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/130688934?v=4"
       alt="GitHub avatar of liketocood345"
       class="about-me-avatar" />
</a>

<p class="about-me-username">
  <a href="https://github.com/liketocood345">liketocood345</a>
</p>

<p class="about-me-note">
  This account hosts other public repositories, so personal details are not shared here for now.
</p>

</div>
```
